title: [Bob's] Better Prime
description: [Bob's] Better Prime - is a mod that add prime and feastables to the game for the purpose to get some effect in the game that can be harder to get in survival
body:
# [Bob's] Better Prime
  Bobs better prime is a mod that adds a few things :
  1. 8 Prime Flavors (For now)
  2. 3 Feastables Flavor (Also for now)
  3. Uranium and Uranium ore 

## More Info 
### Prime:
Prime Bottles is an item use for mostly pvp beacuse every prime flavors give you another effect That can be good while youre in combat
1. Ice Pop (Slow Falling)
2. lemonade (Haste)
3. Lime (Hero of the villige)
4. Grape (invisibility)
5. Red Vs Blue (Speed , Jumpboost)
6. Blue Raspberry (Night vision , Water Breathing)
7. Tropical Punch (Regeneriton , Instant Health)
8. Orange (Fire Resistance)

### Feastables:
Feastables give you the same thing for now there is only there but we will make more in future updates
1. Milk Crunch (Resistance)
2. Milk Chocolate (Saturation)
3. Peanut Butter (Dolphins Grace)

### Uranium:
Uranium is an ore that will help you make all the items in the mod, you need to brew it into akward potion to make plain prime that is the main ingridiant for the items in the mod, also uranium ore can make power like a redstone block but 3x time stronger 
![[Bob's Better Prime]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1a59e4f365c154de6ec6099b8322d218952eecd.png)
